```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.adi_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_cent[, which(names(df.zscore_cent) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg_qc", "median_euler_mean", "ADI.median"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.adi_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.adi_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.adi_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.adi_sa$label <- rownames(bw.qc.adi_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC <- bw.qc.adi_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.adi_sa
name <- "bw.qc.adi_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.adi_sa_noplot <- bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.adi_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC and ADI covar, Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.adi_dkt_sa_plot, "bw-qc-adi-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(dim(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC[order(bw.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_sa <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_sa[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_sa[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore_cent, aes(x = birth_weight_kg_qc, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_sa[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.adi_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_cent[, which(names(df.zscore_cent) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg_qc", "adjusted_age_in_years", "median_euler_mean", "ADI.median", "birth_weight_kg_qc:adjusted_age_in_years"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[6,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[6,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[6,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.adi_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.adi_sa$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage.qc.adi_sa$label <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC <- bwbyage.qc.adi_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage.qc.adi_sa
name <- "bwbyage.qc.adi_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc_sa_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and ADI covar, Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc_dkt_sa_plot, "bwbyage-qc-adi-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage.qc.adi_sa_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore_cent[,grepl(vars[i], names(df.zscore_cent))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg_qc*adjusted_age_in_years, df.zscore_cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg_qc, modx = adjusted_age_in_years) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage.qc beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for cortical thickness is {"ADI.median"}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_cent$birth_weight_kg_qc))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.adi_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_cent[, which(names(df.zscore_cent) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg_qc", "median_euler_mean", "ADI.median"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.adi_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.adi_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.adi_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.adi_th$label <- rownames(bw.qc.adi_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC <- bw.qc.adi_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.adi_th
name <- "bw.qc.adi_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.adi_th_noplot <- bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.adi_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC and ADI covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.adi_dkt_th_plot, "bw-qc-adi-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(dim(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0) {
top_n = if(dim(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC[order(abs(bw.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$bw_beta), decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_th <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  print(i)
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  print(pheno)
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_th)[i] <- pheno
  scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_th[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore_cent, aes(x = birth_weight_kg_qc, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_bw.qc.adi_th[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.adi_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_cent[, which(names(df.zscore_cent) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg_qc", "adjusted_age_in_years", "median_euler_mean", "ADI.median", "birth_weight_kg_qc:adjusted_age_in_years"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[6,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[6,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[6,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.adi_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.adi_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.adi_th$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.adi_th$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage.qc.adi_th$label <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.adi_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)
  
bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC <- bwbyage.qc.adi_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage.qc.adi_th
name <- "bwbyage.qc.adi_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc.adi_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and ADI covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.adi_dkt_th_plot, "bwbyage-qc-adi-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(dim(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0) {
vars <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage.qc.adi_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore_cent[,grepl(vars[i], names(df.zscore_cent))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg_qc*adjusted_age_in_years, df.zscore_cent)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg_qc, modx = adjusted_age_in_years) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage.qc.adi beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

####  group by age and check bw.qc.adi on thickness effect

##### young

###### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_cent_young$birth_weight_kg_qc))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.adi_th_young <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_cent_young[, which(names(df.zscore_cent_young) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg_qc", "median_euler_mean", "ADI.median"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_cent_young)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.adi_th_young$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.adi_th_young$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.adi_th_young %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

###### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.adi_th_young$label <- rownames(bw.qc.adi_th_young) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.adi_th_young_sig_MC <- bw.qc.adi_th_young %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.adi_th_young_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

###### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.adi_th_young
name <- "bw.qc.adi_thick_young.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

###### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.adi_th_young_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.adi_th_young_noplot <- bw.qc.adi_th_young_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.adi_th_young_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.adi_th_young_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.adiyoung_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, Young, QC and ADI covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.adiyoung_dkt_th_plot, "bw-qc-meanth-young-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### old

###### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_cent_old$birth_weight_kg_qc))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.adi_th_old <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_cent_old[, which(names(df.zscore_cent_old) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg_qc", "median_euler_mean", "ADI.median"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_cent_old)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.adi_th_old$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.adi_th_old$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.adi_th_old %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

###### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.adi_th_old$label <- rownames(bw.qc.adi_th_old) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.adi_th_old_sig_MC <- bw.qc.adi_th_old %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.adi_th_old_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

###### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.adi_th_old
name <- "bw.qc.adi_thick_old.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

###### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.adi_th_old_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.adi_th_old_noplot <- bw.qc.adi_th_old_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.adi_th_old_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.adi_th_old_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.adiold_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, Old, QC and ADI covar, Cortical Thickness"))
if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.adiold_dkt_th_plot, "bw-qc-meanth-old-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```
